_comment: Drop-in secrets file for the Adafruit_Wippersnapper_Arduino firmware when running against the HIL bench's local ProtoMQ broker instead of io.adafruit.com. Copy to secrets.json (uncommented) and let the HIL controller substitute values from per-repo secrets at flash time. See examples/README.md for the substitution flow.
_hil_overrides_comment: Fields below are ProtoMQ / HIL extensions consumed by the firmware when running on the bench. The HIL controller injects pi5-protomq.local (192.168.1.210) for protomq.host and 1884 for protomq.port (see vendor/hil-detection/references/hardware.md).
